texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: TERMS & CONDITIONS
texts.text: TERMS & CONDITIONS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: These  terms  and  conditions  constitute  a  contract under Kenyan Law. By completing a booking online via our website, or a third-party booking platform, or directly with our reservations team, and/or sending a deposit payment, you are agreeing to the following terms and conditions.
texts.text: These  terms  and  conditions  constitute  a  contract under Kenyan Law. By completing a booking online via our website, or a third-party booking platform, or directly with our reservations team, and/or sending a deposit payment, you are agreeing to the following terms and conditions.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 1. Inclusions
texts.text: 1. Inclusions

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Transfers from the Vipingo Ridge airstrip.
texts.text: Transfers from the Vipingo Ridge airstrip.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Breakfast.
texts.text: Breakfast.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. High Speed Wi-Fi.
texts.text: High Speed Wi-Fi.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. Access to the Clubhouse, Sundowner Bar & Beach Club.
texts.text: Access to the Clubhouse, Sundowner Bar & Beach Club.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5. In-house guests receive a preferential discount on golf rounds throughout their stay
texts.text: In-house guests receive a preferential discount on golf rounds throughout their stay

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 2. Food and beverage
texts.text: 2. Food and beverage

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Vipingo  Ridge  has  a  variety of dining options.  The  Club  House,  Sundowner  Bar and  Beach  Club  each  have  a  bar,  and different menus.
texts.text: Vipingo  Ridge  has  a  variety of dining options.  The  Club  House,  Sundowner  Bar and  Beach  Club  each  have  a  bar,  and different menus.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 3. Payment
texts.text: 3. Payment

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Payment  in  full  is  due  at  the  point  of booking.
texts.text: Payment  in  full  is  due  at  the  point  of booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Invoices will be provided in Kenya Shillings (KES)  or  United  States  Dollar  (USD)  at  an exchange rate set by Vipingo Ridge Ltd.
texts.text: Invoices will be provided in Kenya Shillings (KES)  or  United  States  Dollar  (USD)  at  an exchange rate set by Vipingo Ridge Ltd.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. Payment  shall  be  made  in  accordance with the currency that has been applied in the invoice
texts.text: Payment  shall  be  made  in  accordance with the currency that has been applied in the invoice

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 4. Cancellation
texts.text: 4. Cancellation

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Cancellations are only effective on receipt of written notification.  Receipt  of  the  cancellation  must  be confirmed  in  writing  by Vipingo  Ridge  Ltd.  Unless written confirmation of the cancellation is received from Vipingo Ridge Ltd., the cancellation is not valid. In the event of a valid cancellation notification being received, the following terms will apply:
texts.text: Cancellations are only effective on receipt of written notification.  Receipt  of  the  cancellation  must  be confirmed  in  writing  by Vipingo  Ridge  Ltd.  Unless written confirmation of the cancellation is received from Vipingo Ridge Ltd., the cancellation is not valid. In the event of a valid cancellation notification being received, the following terms will apply:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. If  cancellation  is  made  between  20  -  15 days a penalty of 25% of the booking will be charged.
texts.text: If  cancellation  is  made  between  20  -  15 days a penalty of 25% of the booking will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. If  cancellation  is  made  between  14  -  10 days a penalty of 40% of the booking will be charged.
texts.text: If  cancellation  is  made  between  14  -  10 days a penalty of 40% of the booking will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. If cancellation is made between 9 - 5 days a  penalty  of  60%  of  the  booking  will  be charged.
texts.text: If cancellation is made between 9 - 5 days a  penalty  of  60%  of  the  booking  will  be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. If cancellation is made between 4 - 1 day a  penalty  of  80%  of  the  booking  will  be charged.
texts.text: If cancellation is made between 4 - 1 day a  penalty  of  80%  of  the  booking  will  be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5. No shows 100% will be charged.
texts.text: No shows 100% will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 6. 'Force  Majeure'  clause  may  be  applied where necessary.
texts.text: 'Force  Majeure'  clause  may  be  applied where necessary.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 5.  Guest  information  -  Prior  to  arrival  at Vipingo Ridge
texts.text: 5.  Guest  information  -  Prior  to  arrival  at Vipingo Ridge

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If  any  of  the  members  of  your  booking  have  any requirements  during  your  stay,  please  contact  the reservations team prior to arrival. This should include but not be limited to:
texts.text: If  any  of  the  members  of  your  booking  have  any requirements  during  your  stay,  please  contact  the reservations team prior to arrival. This should include but not be limited to:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Accommodation requirements -bed configuration or children's cots.
texts.text: Accommodation requirements -bed configuration or children's cots.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Dietary requirements - including intolerances and allergies.
texts.text: Dietary requirements - including intolerances and allergies.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. Mobility and accessibility requirements.
texts.text: Mobility and accessibility requirements.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. Medical  conditions  that  our  team  should  be aware of.
texts.text: Medical  conditions  that  our  team  should  be aware of.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5. Special requests or celebrations.
texts.text: Special requests or celebrations.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 6. Method and time of arrival at Vipingo Ridge.
texts.text: Method and time of arrival at Vipingo Ridge.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 6. Guest information - Upon arrival at Vipingo Ridge
texts.text: 6. Guest information - Upon arrival at Vipingo Ridge

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Upon arrival at Vipingo Ridge you will be required to provide the following information:
texts.text: Upon arrival at Vipingo Ridge you will be required to provide the following information:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Passport identification for each guest.
texts.text: Passport identification for each guest.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Proof of residency (Kenyan residents only).
texts.text: Proof of residency (Kenyan residents only).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. A  valid  credit  card  to  cover  any  incidental charges and in the event of damage or removal of Vipingo Ridge property.
texts.text: A  valid  credit  card  to  cover  any  incidental charges and in the event of damage or removal of Vipingo Ridge property.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 7. Damage to Vipingo Ridge Property
texts.text: 7. Damage to Vipingo Ridge Property

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Vipingo Ridge Ltd. reserve the right to charge a guest (s)  the  cost  of  rectifying  the  damage  caused by the deliberate, negligent, or reckless act of the guest (s) to the company's property or structure.
texts.text: Vipingo Ridge Ltd. reserve the right to charge a guest (s)  the  cost  of  rectifying  the  damage  caused by the deliberate, negligent, or reckless act of the guest (s) to the company's property or structure.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 8. Removal of Vipingo Ridge Property
texts.text: 8. Removal of Vipingo Ridge Property

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Vipingo Ridge Ltd. reserve the right to charge guests the cost of replacing any items that are removed from the company's property without consent. These items include but are not limited to:
texts.text: Vipingo Ridge Ltd. reserve the right to charge guests the cost of replacing any items that are removed from the company's property without consent. These items include but are not limited to:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Linen - including bedding and towels.
texts.text: Linen - including bedding and towels.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Bathroom  provisions  -  including  soap  and shampoo dispensers.
texts.text: Bathroom  provisions  -  including  soap  and shampoo dispensers.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. Electrical appliances.
texts.text: Electrical appliances.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. Glassware and crockery.
texts.text: Glassware and crockery.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5. Décor or ornamental items.
texts.text: Décor or ornamental items.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 9. Villa and Hotel Room Occupancies
texts.text: 9. Villa and Hotel Room Occupancies

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The villas at Vipingo Ridge are all different sizes and have a different number of rooms. Please note that the maximum occupancy in each room is 2 people (a child 3 years and under can be accommodated in a cot in each of the rooms in the villa or hotel rooms). Therefore  a  1-bedroom  villa  can  accommodate  a maximum of 2 adults + an infant under 3 years, a 2 bedroom villa  can  accommodate  a  maximum  of  4 adults + 2 infants under 3 years etc. The one-bedroom standard  room  option  may  be  a  room  in  a  larger villa, which is self-contained and separated from the other rooms which may be occupied by other guests. These  occupancy  restrictions  also  include  the  selfcontained standard rooms.
texts.text: The villas at Vipingo Ridge are all different sizes and have a different number of rooms. Please note that the maximum occupancy in each room is 2 people (a child 3 years and under can be accommodated in a cot in each of the rooms in the villa or hotel rooms). Therefore  a  1-bedroom  villa  can  accommodate  a maximum of 2 adults + an infant under 3 years, a 2 bedroom villa  can  accommodate  a  maximum  of  4 adults + 2 infants under 3 years etc. The one-bedroom standard  room  option  may  be  a  room  in  a  larger villa, which is self-contained and separated from the other rooms which may be occupied by other guests. These  occupancy  restrictions  also  include  the  selfcontained standard rooms.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 10. Child Policy
texts.text: 10. Child Policy

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Vipingo Ridge Ltd. welcomes children of all ages.
texts.text: Vipingo Ridge Ltd. welcomes children of all ages.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Infants are defined as 3 years of age and below and can be accommodated in a cot as covered in 9 above.
texts.text: Infants are defined as 3 years of age and below and can be accommodated in a cot as covered in 9 above.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. There is no reduction in room rates for children.
texts.text: There is no reduction in room rates for children.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. Children are defined for the purposes of room occupancy  restrictions  as  between  4  and  18 years of age and are counted as a hotel guest as covered in 9 above.
texts.text: Children are defined for the purposes of room occupancy  restrictions  as  between  4  and  18 years of age and are counted as a hotel guest as covered in 9 above.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. Adults for the purposes of occupancy restrictions are any guest over the age of 18.
texts.text: Adults for the purposes of occupancy restrictions are any guest over the age of 18.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5. Children should be always accompanied by an adult at Vipingo Ridge.
texts.text: Children should be always accompanied by an adult at Vipingo Ridge.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 11. Flights and Transfers to Vipingo Ridge
texts.text: 11. Flights and Transfers to Vipingo Ridge

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Whilst our reservations team can advise on  flights  and  transfers  to  Vipingo  Ridge  all bookings  are  the  responsibility  of  our  guests, as is the impact of any cancellation or delay to these external services.
texts.text: Whilst our reservations team can advise on  flights  and  transfers  to  Vipingo  Ridge  all bookings  are  the  responsibility  of  our  guests, as is the impact of any cancellation or delay to these external services.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Guests  are  advised  to  check  the  differences between  international  and  domestic  airlines baggage allowances.
texts.text: Guests  are  advised  to  check  the  differences between  international  and  domestic  airlines baggage allowances.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 12. Wild Animals
texts.text: 12. Wild Animals

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Vipingo  Ridge  is  a  wildlife  sanctuary  and  is home to a wide variety of wildlife  including  eland, impala, Grant's gazelle, oryx, waterbuck, giraffe, and zebra.
texts.text: Vipingo  Ridge  is  a  wildlife  sanctuary  and  is home to a wide variety of wildlife  including  eland, impala, Grant's gazelle, oryx, waterbuck, giraffe, and zebra.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. All  guests  must,  at  all  times,  adhere  to  the directions provided by the employees of Vipingo Ridge Ltd.
texts.text: All  guests  must,  at  all  times,  adhere  to  the directions provided by the employees of Vipingo Ridge Ltd.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. To the extent permitted by law, neither Vipingo Ridge  Ltd.,  nor  its  employees,  can  be  held responsible for any injury or incident which may occur during a guest stay.
texts.text: To the extent permitted by law, neither Vipingo Ridge  Ltd.,  nor  its  employees,  can  be  held responsible for any injury or incident which may occur during a guest stay.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 13. Insurance
texts.text: 13. Insurance

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We  strongly  recommend  that  all  guests  purchase adequate travel insurance to cover cancellation fees due to unforeseen circumstances, medical expenses, personal baggage, and money. Insurance should be arranged  before  booking  and  details  provided  to Vipingo Ridge Ltd.
texts.text: We  strongly  recommend  that  all  guests  purchase adequate travel insurance to cover cancellation fees due to unforeseen circumstances, medical expenses, personal baggage, and money. Insurance should be arranged  before  booking  and  details  provided  to Vipingo Ridge Ltd.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 14. Force Majeure
texts.text: 14. Force Majeure

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Vipingo Ridge Ltd. reserves the right at any time and at their discretion to make alterations or cancel any accommodation  or  services,  that  poses  a  risk  due to  serious  adverse  weather  conditions,  pandemic, epidemic,  other  serious  health  risks,  other  serious security problems, natural disasters, or political unrest. Any extra expense arising out of the cancellation or alteration of accommodation or excursion will fall to the guest (s).
texts.text: Vipingo Ridge Ltd. reserves the right at any time and at their discretion to make alterations or cancel any accommodation  or  services,  that  poses  a  risk  due to  serious  adverse  weather  conditions,  pandemic, epidemic,  other  serious  health  risks,  other  serious security problems, natural disasters, or political unrest. Any extra expense arising out of the cancellation or alteration of accommodation or excursion will fall to the guest (s).

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 15. Disputes
texts.text: 15. Disputes

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Concerns  must  be  raised  with  management  from Vipingo  Ridge  Ltd  at  the  time  of  guests  stay  and prior to guest's departure. This will assist in resolving any  disputes  and  reaching  a  mutually  beneficial conclusion for all. Should this not be possible, then concerns must be followed up in writing to Vipingo Ridge Ltd. not later than 14 days from departure date, where  the  Kenyan  legal  system  will  be  adhered  to exclusively.
texts.text: Concerns  must  be  raised  with  management  from Vipingo  Ridge  Ltd  at  the  time  of  guests  stay  and prior to guest's departure. This will assist in resolving any  disputes  and  reaching  a  mutually  beneficial conclusion for all. Should this not be possible, then concerns must be followed up in writing to Vipingo Ridge Ltd. not later than 14 days from departure date, where  the  Kenyan  legal  system  will  be  adhered  to exclusively.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 16. Privacy Policy
texts.text: 16. Privacy Policy

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Vipingo  Ridge  Ltd.  is  committed  to  keeping  all personal information from agents and guests confidential. Vipingo Ridge Ltd. will not be held liable for  any  loss  or  damage  arising  from  third  parties unauthorized to access this information.
texts.text: Vipingo  Ridge  Ltd.  is  committed  to  keeping  all personal information from agents and guests confidential. Vipingo Ridge Ltd. will not be held liable for  any  loss  or  damage  arising  from  third  parties unauthorized to access this information.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 17. Price Variations
texts.text: 17. Price Variations

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event of an increase in taxes, training levy or service charges, Vipingo Ridge Ltd. reserves the right to adjust all rates accordingly from the date of such change and without prior notice.
texts.text: In the event of an increase in taxes, training levy or service charges, Vipingo Ridge Ltd. reserves the right to adjust all rates accordingly from the date of such change and without prior notice.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 18. Liability Disclaimer
texts.text: 18. Liability Disclaimer

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Vipingo Ridge Ltd, its owners, directors, management, or employees shall not be held liable for any loss or damage  whatsoever  to  personal  property,  or  any claims or demands from guests on account of injury, illness  or  death  to  persons  visiting  the  property, whether caused by negligence or otherwise.
texts.text: Vipingo Ridge Ltd, its owners, directors, management, or employees shall not be held liable for any loss or damage  whatsoever  to  personal  property,  or  any claims or demands from guests on account of injury, illness  or  death  to  persons  visiting  the  property, whether caused by negligence or otherwise.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. At  its  discretion,  and  without  liability  or  cost to itself, Vipingo Ridge Ltd. may terminate the guests booking.
texts.text: At  its  discretion,  and  without  liability  or  cost to itself, Vipingo Ridge Ltd. may terminate the guests booking.
